entity.summary: Ethereum mainnet decentralized exchange and liquidity hub combining concentrated-liquidity spot trading with community-owned capital-market infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party Cypher website and application remain reachable. DefiLlama identifies Cypher V4 as an Ethereum CLMM DEX with current TVL and active DEX volume. HEI consolidates Cypher V2 and V4 source rows into one entity.

evidence.title: Cypher official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website presents Cypher as the liquidity hub for Ethereum mainnet and links the live application.

evidence.title: Cypher application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint remains reachable as the live exchange interface.

evidence.title: Cypher V4 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Cypher V4 as an Ethereum CLMM DEX and reports current TVL and active DEX volume; HEI consolidates version rows under one Cypher entity.
